summary: Record cleanup automation follow-ups discovered while reconciling split goal-runtime worktree changes.

observations.surface: goal runtime generated artifacts and artifact freshness inputs
observations.problem: Split worktree reconciliation exposed stale ignored goal-run build logs, source-package extraction trees, and obsolete tracked goal checkpoint reports that can survive after the canonical goal runtime changes.
observations.why_it_matters: Long unattended runs need artifact currentness to reflect the active runtime, not leftovers from a previous runner shape or another workspace.
observations.automation_candidate: Add a cleanup or guard target that prunes ignored transient goal/source-package artifacts and flags tracked goal-checkpoint reports no longer referenced by the canonical goal-run status path.
observations.suggested_followup: Implement a deterministic transient-artifact cleanup gate before artifact-freshness/report regeneration, with compatibility exceptions only for reports still consumed by learning or backlog summarizers.
